title: SimpleCalc
body:
🧮 **SimpleCalc** - Math in Chat! ✨


**🚀 Features:**
- `/calc 69+420` → **489** (instant)
- **+ - * /** all work
- **Zero lag GUI for low end devices**
- Works **everywhere**
**💡 Usage:** `/calc <math>`

Its mainly for Skyblock in Fakepixed made to easily calculate in your inventory without opening an additional calculator



![Mobile Gui](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/900754c16d17c2771487797e486c1a1ab713cbd3.png)
![Config Gui](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1892153322671b70ebe3b1de28147abd820bc189.webp)
~~~~
Made by **menear** ❤️
~~~~
